title: SpaceX stock falls below $150 debut price, sending market cap under $2 trillion
title_zh: SpaceX 股价跌破 150 美元首发价，市值跌破 2 万亿美元
text: Gains have been pared back at the space and AI company following an initial surge after its record-breaking IPO.
zh: 这家太空和人工智能公司在破纪录的首次公开募股(IPO)后最初飙升，但其涨幅已有所回落。

title: Meta announces new smart glasses starting at $299, as Zuckerberg keeps pushing wearables
title_zh: 扎克伯格不断推动可穿戴设备，Meta 宣布新款智能眼镜起价 299 美元
text: Meta executives have said they see the lightweight smart glasses as a step towards a more advanced device that includes screens in the lenses.
zh: Meta 高管表示，他们认为这款轻型智能眼镜是迈向更先进设备（镜片中带有屏幕）的一步。

title: Sens. Warren, Kelly press Trump administration on effects of tariffs on manufacturing
title_zh: 参议员沃伦和凯利就关税对制造业的影响向特朗普政府施压
text: A pair of Democratic senators is asking for answers from the Trump administration on the effect of tariffs on U.S. manufacturing.
zh: 两位民主党参议员正在要求特朗普政府就关税对美国制造业的影响给出答案。

title: Google’s online dominance is showing signs of cracking in AI era
title_zh: 谷歌的在线统治地位在人工智能时代出现破裂迹象
text: While Google remains in a position of strength in the eyes of Wall Street, the AI era is complicating the company's story.
zh: 尽管谷歌在华尔街眼中仍然处于强势地位，但人工智能时代使该公司的故事变得更加复杂。

title: AI memory startup focused on cutting token costs raises $98 million
title_zh: 专注于削减代币成本的 AI 内存初创公司筹集了 9800 万美元
text: Engram enters the market as the AI industry grapples with a rising cost problem fueled by more expensive models.
zh: Engram 进入市场之际，人工智能行业正在努力应对模型更昂贵导致的成本上升问题。

title: Trump Account signups now total more than 6 million, but millions more children are eligible
title_zh: 特朗普账户注册人数现已超过 600 万，但还有数百万儿童符合资格
text: Trump Accounts will soon be available to millions of U.S. children; however, many may miss out on the savings opportunity — and free money.
zh: 特朗普账户很快将向数百万美国儿童开放；然而，许多人可能会错过储蓄机会和免费资金。

title: Lucid to lay off roughly 18% of U.S. workforce, COO Marc Winterhoff leaves
title_zh: 首席运营官马克·温特霍夫 (Marc Winterhoff) 离职，Lucid 将裁员约 18% 的美国员工
text: Lucid Group is cutting its U.S. workforce by 18% as part of a cost-savings plan. It also said COO Marc Winterhoff is departing effective immediately.
zh: 作为成本节约计划的一部分，Lucid Group 将在美国裁员 18%。它还表示，首席运营官马克·温特霍夫(Marc Winterhoff)将立即离职。

title: The Club's top 10 things to watch in the stock market Tuesday
title_zh: 俱乐部周二股市最值得关注的十大事件
text: The Nasdaq is set for a sharply lower open, as the plunge in South Korean stocks bleeds into the U.S.
zh: 随着韩国股市暴跌蔓延至美国，纳斯达克指数预计大幅低开。

title: 'Reward for failure': Investor support for Target Chair Brian Cornell falls to lowest level ever
title_zh: “失败的奖励”：投资者对塔吉特董事长布莱恩·康奈尔的支持降至有史以来的最低水平
text: Target Chair Brian Cornell built the retailer into a $100 billion-plus giant, but recent struggles and underperformance have fueled investor calls for change.
zh: Target 董事长布莱恩·康奈尔 (Brian Cornell) 将这家零售商打造成价值超过 1000 亿美元的巨头，但最近的困境和业绩不佳引发了投资者要求变革的呼声。

title: Berkshire shares trade lower even after Abel scores good marks at meeting, earnings jump
title_zh: 即使阿贝尔在会议上取得好成绩、盈利大幅增长，伯克希尔股价仍走低
text: Many in the investment community were reassured by Abel's firm grasp over Berkshire's sprawling enterprise.
zh: 阿贝尔对伯克希尔庞大企业的坚定控制让投资界的许多人感到放心。

title: Global recession is inevitable if Strait of Hormuz stays shut, says Citadel's Ken Griffin
title_zh: Citadel 的 Ken Griffin 表示，如果霍尔木兹海峡继续关闭，全球经济衰退将不可避免
text: A prolonged blockage of the Strait of Hormuz for the next six to 12 months will mean an unavoidable recession, the billionaire investor said.
zh: 这位亿万富翁投资者表示，未来 6 到 12 个月霍尔木兹海峡的长期封锁将意味着不可避免的经济衰退。

title: Stock investors expect the Fed to save them. But no ‘Warsh put’ is coming.
title_zh: 股票投资者期望美联储能够拯救他们。但“沃什看跌期权”不会到来。
text: Wall Street’s belief in a central bank safety net misreads the dot-com crash. Alan Greenspan was following rules — not saving portfolios.
zh: 华尔街对央行安全网的信念误判了互联网泡沫破裂。艾伦·格林斯潘遵守规则——不储蓄投资组合。

title: Everyday investors fueled the SpaceX trading frenzy. Now they face a bear market.
title_zh: 日常投资者助长了 SpaceX 的交易狂潮。现在他们面临熊市。
text: From six-figure retirement gambles to tactical day trades, retail investors have made big bets on SpaceX’s volatile stock.
zh: 从六位数的退休赌博到战术日内交易，散户投资者对 SpaceX 波动较大的股票下了大注。

title: I’m 70. A relative offered me a $25,000 home loan secured by a lien that must be repaid within a year. Is that fair?
title_zh: 我今年 70 岁。一位亲戚向我提供了一笔 25,000 美元的住房贷款，该贷款有留置权，必须在一年内偿还。这公平吗？
text: “He also wants me to downsize and move.”
zh: “他还希望我缩小规模并搬家。”

title: Researchers cracked the code on predicting market bubbles. Here’s what it’s saying about today’s stock prices.
title_zh: 研究人员破解了预测市场泡沫的密码。这是它对今天股价的评价。
text: Recent price run-ups don’t mean a bubble is about to burst — unless you’re looking at this sector.
zh: 最近的价格上涨并不意味着泡沫即将破裂——除非你关注的是这个行业。

title: Tech rout intensifies as sell-off grips global stocks
title_zh: 全球股市遭遇抛售，科技股跌势加剧
text: Global stocks sold off on Tuesday, led by deep losses for tech stocks following a losing session for the sector on Wall Street.
zh: 周二，全球股市遭遇抛售，其中科技股在华尔街股市下跌后大幅下跌。

title: Oracle sheds 21,000 roles over the past year amid wave of AI layoffs from tech giants
title_zh: 科技巨头人工智能裁员浪潮中，甲骨文去年裁员 21,000 人
text: "The adoption and deployment of AI technologies across our operations have resulted, and may continue to result, in reductions to our workforce," Oracle said.
zh: 甲骨文表示：“在我们的运营中采用和部署人工智能技术已经并可能继续导致我们的员工人数减少。”

title: U.S. issues sweeping Iran oil sanctions waivers, unlocking billions in revenue for Tehran
title_zh: 美国全面豁免伊朗石油制裁，为德黑兰释放数十亿美元的收入
text: The U.S. issued a sweeping rollback of sanctions on Iranian oil, offering Tehran an economic lifeline as negotiations toward a peace deal proceed.
zh: 美国全面取消对伊朗石油的制裁，为德黑兰提供了一条经济生命线，以推动和平协议谈判的进行。

title: Apollo curbs withdrawals after exit requests hit 17%, reigniting fears over private credit liquidity
title_zh: Apollo 在退出请求达到 17% 后限制提款，重新引发对私人信贷流动性的担忧
text: Apollo is capping investor redemptions in its main retail-focused private credit fund after exit requests hit 17%.
zh: 在退出请求达到 17% 后，Apollo 正在限制其主要零售私人信贷基金的投资者赎回。

title: U.S. fights with Brazil for China's giant soybean market
title_zh: 美国与巴西争夺中国巨大大豆市场
text: The U.S. Soybean Export Council makes claims to higher quality a selling point over Brazil's crop, as American farmers attempt to win back business from the world's largest importer
zh: 美国大豆出口委员会声称更高质量是巴西作物的卖点，因为美国农民试图从世界最大进口国手中夺回业务

title: AI groups spend $20 million going head-to-head in New York race pitting Bores, Lasher, Schlossberg
title_zh: 人工智能团体花费 2000 万美元在纽约比赛中与 Bores、Lasher 和 Schlossberg 进行正面交锋
text: Companies are spending big to shape AI policies at the federal level. And the Manhattan House Democratic primary will be a test of where voters stand.
zh: 公司正在投入巨资制定联邦层面的人工智能政策。曼哈顿众议院民主党初选将考验选民的立场。

title: Five things to watch in Tuesday's primaries as New York races take center stage
title_zh: 随着纽约竞选成为焦点，周二初选有五件事值得关注
text: Tuesday’s primaries in New York, Maryland and Utah test outside money, party power and the influence of Zohran Mamdani and Donald Trump.
zh: 周二在纽约、马里兰州和犹他州举行的初选将考验外部资金、政党权力以及佐兰·马姆达尼和唐纳德·特朗普的影响力。

title: How Europe is grappling with extreme heat as red alerts issued in Britain, France, Spain and Italy
title_zh: 英国、法国、西班牙和意大利发布红色警报，欧洲如何应对极端高温
text: Several European countries issued red weather alerts as a fresh bout of extreme heat pushed temperatures beyond 40 degrees Celsius (104 degrees Fahrenheit).
zh: 由于新一轮极端高温使气温超过 40 摄氏度（104 华氏度），一些欧洲国家发布了红色天气警报。

title: Singtel sells $773 million Thai energy stake as it ramps up AI and data center investments
title_zh: 新加坡电信出售价值 7.73 亿美元的泰国能源股份，加大人工智能和数据中心投资
text: Southeast Asia's largest telecom operator sold 2.8% stake for about S$1 billion in Gulf Development.
zh: 东南亚最大的电信运营商以约 10 亿新元的价格出售了海湾发展公司 2.8% 的股份。

title: CNBC Elite Advisors: Top ultra-high net worth wealth management firms for 2026
title_zh: CNBC Elite Advisors：2026 年顶级超高净值财富管理公司
text: CNBC Elite Advisors recognizes wealth management firms serving high net worth and UHNW clients.
zh: CNBC 精英顾问认可为高净值和超高净值客户提供服务的财富管理公司。

title: Investor assumptions about the AI trade are starting to stretch reality, Goldman Sachs says
title_zh: 高盛表示，投资者对人工智能行业的假设开始扭曲现实
text: Investors may be racing ahead of what the AI trade can deliver, warns Goldman Sachs
zh: 高盛警告称，投资者可能正在抢先于人工智能行业所能带来的成果

title: ‘It feels like a medical miracle’: How did a single QR code coupon cut my $618 Walgreens prescription to $15?
title_zh: “感觉就像一个医学奇迹”：一张二维码优惠券如何将我 618 美元的沃尔格林处方药减至 15 美元？
text: “This medication was generic.”
zh: “这种药物是通用的。”

title: The AI market has become a ‘rubber band’ — the question now is how far it can stretch, says Goldman strategist
title_zh: 高盛策略师表示，人工智能市场已成为一根“橡皮筋”——现在的问题是它能延伸多远
text: Rich Privorotsky, strategist at Goldman Sachs, said that while so-called hyperscalers continue to increase their capital expenditure forecasts, artificial intelligence software is becoming cheaper to develop elsewhere
zh: 高盛策略师 Rich Privorotsky 表示，虽然所谓的超大规模企业继续提高资本支出预测，但在其他地方开发人工智能软件的成本正变得越来越低

title: I want to leave everything to my sons, but I’m terrified they’ll give it to my ex-husband. How do I prevent this?
title_zh: 我想把一切都留给我的儿子们，但我害怕他们会把它交给我的前夫。我该如何防止这种情况？
text: “I would not like my money to fall into the hands of my former spouse.”
zh: “我不希望我的钱落入我前配偶的手中。”

title: This billionaire trading tycoon argues the public is looking at federal debt all wrong
title_zh: 这位亿万富翁贸易大亨认为公众对联邦债务的看法完全错误
text: The conventional wisdom is that federal government debt — $39.1 trillion, or a mere $31.6 trillion when accounting for the liabilities owed to itself — is astronomically high. Jeff Yass said that isn’t the right comparison.
zh: 传统观点认为，联邦政府的债务——39.1万亿美元，或者算上自己所欠的债务，仅为31.6万亿美元——是一个天文数字。杰夫·亚斯 (Jeff Yass) 表示，这样的比较并不正确。

title: Brexit 10 years later: How the UK economy and politics changed, in charts
title_zh: 英国脱欧十年后：图表中英国经济和政治如何变化
text: Ten years after the Brexit vote, CNBC compiled these charts show how the U.K. has changed across growth, immigration, sterling, trade and politics.
zh: 英国脱欧公投十年后，CNBC 编制了这些图表，展示了英国在增长、移民、英镑、贸易和政治方面的变化。

title: Global M&A deal value on track to reach $4 trillion this year: PwC
title_zh: 普华永道：今年全球并购交易价值有望达到 4 万亿美元
text: Global deal value of M&A is on track to reach $4 trillion in 2026, making it the strongest year since 2021
zh: 2026 年全球并购交易价值有望达到 4 万亿美元，成为 2021 年以来最强劲的一年

title: If you're surprised by how well the stock market is doing, so is Jamie Dimon - Fortune
title_zh: 如果你对股市的表现感到惊讶，那么杰米·戴蒙 (Jamie Dimon) 也会如此 - 《财富》
text: If you're surprised by how well the stock market is doing, so is Jamie Dimon Fortune
zh: 如果您对股市的表现感到惊讶，那么杰米·戴蒙 (Jamie Dimon) 也会感到惊讶 - 财富中文网

title: China ETFs: A Comprehensive Guide On How To Invest In China - KraneShares
title_zh: 中国ETF：如何投资中国的综合指南 - KraneShares
text: China ETFs: A Comprehensive Guide On How To Invest In China KraneShares
zh: 中国ETF：如何投资中国金瑞股份综合指南

title: Beijing’s stock exchange values policy over liquidity - East Asia Forum
title_zh: 北京证券交易所重视流动性政策 - 东亚论坛
text: Beijing’s stock exchange values policy over liquidity East Asia Forum
zh: 北京证券交易所重视流动性政策 东亚论坛

title_zh: 亚洲股市因美以与伊朗冲突而暴跌 - 半岛电视台
text: Asia’s stock markets plunge amid US-Israeli conflict with Iran Al Jazeera
zh: 美以与伊朗冲突导致亚洲股市暴跌

title: Wall Street giants lead China-profit surge despite market polarisation - South China Morning Post
title_zh: 尽管市场两极分化，华尔街巨头引领中国利润飙升 - 《南华早报》
text: Wall Street giants lead China-profit surge despite market polarisation South China Morning Post
zh: 尽管市场两极分化，华尔街巨头仍引领中国利润飙升 《南华早报》

title: Chinese Economy Stable Amid Iran War, Lower Middle East Oil Reliance - 조선일보
title_zh: 伊朗战争、中东石油依赖降低，中国经济保持稳定 - 조선일보
text: Chinese Economy Stable Amid Iran War, Lower Middle East Oil Reliance 조선일보
zh: 伊朗战争、降低中东石油依赖，中国经济保持稳定

title: Stock market shock rattles China’s neighbors + Chinese restaurant chains go global - Table.Briefings
title_zh: 股市震荡令中国邻国不安 + 中国连锁餐饮企业走向全球 - Table.Briefings
text: Stock market shock rattles China’s neighbors + Chinese restaurant chains go global Table.Briefings
zh: 股市震荡令中国邻国不安 + 中国连锁餐饮企业走向全球 Table.Briefings

title_zh: 美伊战争期间韩国股市遭遇历史最大跌幅 - 半岛电视台
text: South Korea’s stock market suffers biggest drop in history amid US-Iran war Al Jazeera
zh: 美伊战争期间韩国股市遭遇历史最大跌幅

title: Best China ETFs to Watch in 2026 - Investing.com
title_zh: 2026 年最值得关注的中国 ETF - Investing.com
text: Best China ETFs to Watch in 2026 Investing.com
zh: 2026 年最值得关注的中国 ETF Investing.com

title: China’s Role in the USMCA Review - Baker Institute
title_zh: 中国在 USMCA 审查中的作用 - Baker Institute
text: China’s Role in the USMCA Review Baker Institute
zh: 中国在 USMCA 审查中的作用 Baker Institute

title: Chinese New Year 2026: Will China’s stock market remain open on the Lunar New Year? Here’s the trading sch - The Economic Times
title_zh: 2026年农历新年：农历新年中国股市会继续开市吗？这是交易方案 - 经济时报
text: Chinese New Year 2026: Will China’s stock market remain open on the Lunar New Year? Here’s the trading sch The Economic Times

title_zh: 印尼股市抛售的解释 - The Diplomat – Asia-Pacific
text: Indonesia’s Stock Market Sell-Off, Explained The Diplomat – Asia-Pacific
zh: 外交官解释印尼股市抛售 – 亚太

title: From the US to China, 2025 a blockbuster year for stock markets - Al Jazeera
title_zh: 从美国到中国，2025 年是股市重磅之年 - 半岛电视台
text: From the US to China, 2025 a blockbuster year for stock markets Al Jazeera
zh: 从美国到中国，2025 年是股市重磅之年

title: 'I like their money': Trump threatens lawsuits against ABC for reporting on Reflecting Pool
title_zh: “我喜欢他们的钱”：特朗普威胁对美国广播公司（ABC）提起诉讼，因为它报道了《倒影池》
text: The latest action against ABC comes as the broadcaster faces two investigations from the Federal Communications Commission.
zh: 针对美国广播公司的最新行动正值该广播公司面临联邦通信委员会的两项调查之际。

title: How a $4 billion Indian startup won Meta's backing but lost its founder to WhatsApp
title_zh: 一家价值 40 亿美元的印度初创公司如何赢得 Meta 的支持，但却将创始人输给了 WhatsApp
text: Indian fintech startup Cred will raise $900 million in a round led by Meta, but has lost its founder and CEO to WhatsApp.
zh: 印度金融科技初创公司 Cred 将在 Meta 领投的一轮融资中筹集 9 亿美元，但其创始人兼首席执行官已被 WhatsApp 取代。

title: CNBC's The China Connection newsletter: Tackling EV trucks after success with cars
title_zh: CNBC 的《The China Connection》时事通讯：在汽车取得成功后应对电动卡车
text: Beijing's latest push into electric trucks has echoes of measures announced more than a decade ago to develop new energy passenger cars.
zh: 北京对电动卡车的最新推动与十多年前宣布的发展新能源乘用车的措施相呼应。

title: China's 618 shopping festival growth slows sharply as consumer spending malaise persists
title_zh: 消费者支出持续低迷，中国618购物节增速大幅放缓
text: The latest consumer data reinforce how consumption in China remains subdued.
zh: 最新的消费者数据凸显了中国的消费依然低迷。

title: Oil prices rise as investors continue to watch U.S.-Iran moves, Citi sees 'overhang' disappearing
title_zh: 投资者继续关注美伊动向，油价上涨，花旗认为“悬而未决”正在消失
text: Oil rises slightly early Tuesday as investors continue to assess the latest developments in the Middle East, while showing optimism the conflict may end soon.
zh: 周二早盘油价小幅上涨，投资者继续评估中东的最新事态发展，同时对冲突可能很快结束表示乐观。

title: These 6 fast-growing stocks sit at the cutting edge of space and military technology
title_zh: 这 6 只快速增长的股票处于太空和军事技术的前沿
text: In the wake of the SpaceX IPO, investors can expect global communications and AI data processing — both via satellites — to be important themes for many years.
zh: 在 SpaceX 首次公开募股之后，投资者可以预期全球通信和人工智能数据处理（均通过卫星）将成为多年来的重要主题。

title: China tightens market oversight to create 'slow bull' momentum - Reuters
title_zh: 中国收紧市场监管创造“慢牛”势头 - 路透中文网
text: China tightens market oversight to create 'slow bull' momentum Reuters
zh: 中国收紧市场监管创造“慢牛”势头 路透

title: Who ate all the Chinese stock market returns? - Financial Times
title_zh: 中国股市的收益全部被谁吃掉了？ - 金融时报
text: Who ate all the Chinese stock market returns? Financial Times
zh: 中国股市的收益全部被谁吃掉了？金融时报

title: Is China’s High-Quality Investment Output Economically Viable? - Carnegie Endowment for International Peace

text: Is China’s High-Quality Investment Output Economically Viable? Carnegie Endowment for International Peace

title_zh: 北京再次召集高管，但这就是为什么这比 2021 年引起的担忧要少
text: Beijing is summoning tech executives for meetings as it did in 2021, but now it has less room to wield a heavy hand due to deflation and rivalry with the U.S.
zh: 北京正像 2021 年那样召集科技高管开会，但现在由于通货紧缩和与美国的竞争，其采取高压手段的空间较小。

title: 'We'll see' — Trump hedges on guarantee Iran won't use oil profits to rebuild military
title_zh: “我们拭目以待”——特朗普对冲保证伊朗不会利用石油利润重建军事
text: Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent authorized the import of Iranian oil and refined products into the U.S. through at least August.
zh: 财政部长斯科特·贝森特授权至少在八月份之前将伊朗石油和成品油进口到美国。

title: Tesla faces federal probe after Model 3 slams into Texas home, killing 76-year-old
title_zh: 特斯拉 Model 3 撞上德克萨斯州民宅，导致 76 岁老人死亡，特斯拉面临联邦调查
text: Harris County authorities said that the driver, Michael Butler, said that he had been using Tesla's partially automated driving systems.
zh: 哈里斯县当局表示，司机迈克尔·巴特勒表示，他一直在使用特斯拉的部分自动驾驶系统。

title: Trump may say he’s banning Wall Street from buying homes. Does the bipartisan housing bill actually do that?
title_zh: 特朗普可能会说他正在禁止华尔街购买房屋。两党住房法案真的能做到这一点吗？
text: The measure “will take time to meaningfully affect housing affordability and will not resolve voter frustration in that area,” analysts said.
zh: 分析师表示，该措施“需要时间才能对住房负担能力产生有意义的影响，并且不会解决该地区选民的不满情绪”。

title: Big Tech has split into two artificial-intelligence camps — but the smart money isn’t chasing the next OpenAI
title_zh: 大型科技公司已分裂为两个人工智能阵营——但聪明的资金并不会追逐下一个 OpenAI
text: Why tech giants such as Alphabet and Microsoft are the safer choice in the AI race.
zh: 为什么 Alphabet 和微软等科技巨头是人工智能竞赛中更安全的选择。

title: A 40% market crash is lurking in the IPO pipeline. SpaceX and OpenAI could trigger it.
title_zh: IPO 过程中潜伏着 40% 的市场崩盘。 SpaceX 和 OpenAI 可能会触发它。
text: Prior records for U.S. equity issuance came in 1929 and 2000 — and we all know what happened next.
zh: 美国股票发行的先前记录出现在 1929 年和 2000 年，我们都知道接下来发生了什么。

title: China’s weird new economic spark: toy elves and robocops
title_zh: 中国奇怪的新经济火花：玩具精灵和机械战警
text: Young Chinese aren’t buying status symbols. They’re spending money on things that make them feel something — anything.
zh: 中国年轻人不买身份象征。他们把钱花在能让他们感受到某种东西的东西上——任何东西。

title: Wall Street loves growth stocks — but these 10 ‘losers’ are primed to win
title_zh: 华尔街钟爱成长型股票——但这10只“失败者”已准备好获胜
text: Elon Musk’s $1 trillion SpaceX prediction is probably wrong. Contrarian investors are buying these out-of-favor value plays instead.
zh: 埃隆·马斯克 (Elon Musk) 对 SpaceX 价值 1 万亿美元的预测可能是错误的。逆向投资者转而买入这些不受欢迎的价值股。

title: Caterpillar’s stock hits a milestone as AI-fueled industrials rally sweeps up Wall Street
title_zh: 随着人工智能推动的工业股席卷华尔街，卡特彼勒股价达到里程碑
text: Caterpillar is the hottest stock in the Dow this year, and now one of just two in the index with a share price above $1,000.
zh: 卡特彼勒是今年道琼斯指数中最热门的股票，也是该指数中仅有的两只股价超过 1,000 美元的股票之一。

text: China’s stockmarket rally may hurt the economy The Economist

title: Nvidia's stock struggles as Kalshi traders bet chip prices are coming down
title_zh: Kalshi 交易员押注芯片价格下跌，英伟达股价陷入困境
text: Shares of Nvidia have been faltering recently — and Kalshi traders predict that what the company can charge for chips is also declining.
zh: 英伟达的股价最近一直在下滑，卡尔希交易员预测该公司的芯片收费也在下降。

title: Amazon Prime Day arrives earlier this year. Here's why Wall Street is watching closely
title_zh: 亚马逊 Prime Day 今年早些时候到来。这就是华尔街密切关注的原因
text: This year could see a major drive to everyday essentials, a growing category for the e-commerce giant's annual shopping event.
zh: 今年可能会出现对日常必需品的大力推动，这是这家电子商务巨头年度购物活动中不断增长的类别。

title: Treasury Secretary Bessent backs rate cuts but says he understands if the Fed wants to wait
title_zh: 财政部长贝森特支持降息，但表示他理解美联储是否愿意等待
text: Bessent has previously said the Fed should hasten cutting interest rates, calling reductions "the only ingredient missing" for stronger economic growth.
zh: 贝森特此前曾表示，美联储应加快降息，称降息是经济增长强劲的“唯一缺失的因素”。

title: Warren Buffett says he sold Apple too soon and would buy more of it, though not in this market
title_zh: 沃伦·巴菲特表示，他太早卖掉了苹果公司，并将购买更多苹果公司，尽管不是在这个市场
text: Apple remains Berkshire Hathaway's largest holding even after the conglomerate trimmed its stake at the end of last year.
zh: 即使伯克希尔哈撒韦公司去年底减持了其股份，苹果公司仍然是伯克希尔哈撒韦公司最大的持股公司。

title: Small cap-focused Russell 2000 becomes first U.S. benchmark to enter correction territory
title_zh: 以小盘股为主的罗素 2000 指数成为首个进入调整区间的美国基准指数
text: Small caps are especially sensitive to changes in oil prices and a slowdown in the economic cycle.
zh: 小盘股对油价变化和经济周期放缓尤其敏感。

title: Fed still expects to cut rates once this year despite spiking oil prices
title_zh: 尽管油价飙升，美联储仍预计今年降息一次
text: The central bank's so-called dot plot showed a median estimate of 3.4% for the federal funds rate, the same as at the end of last year.
zh: 央行所谓的点阵图显示，联邦基金利率的中值为3.4%，与去年年底相同。

title: The momentum trades of 2026 are breaking with gold, silver and South Korea down big
title_zh: 2026年的势头交易正在被打破，黄金、白银和韩国大幅下跌
text: Each of these assets caught a bid this year as investors nervous about their exposure to U.S. large cap tech sought out different asset classes.
zh: 由于投资者对美国大型科技公司的风险敞口感到紧张，因此这些资产今年都受到了竞购，纷纷寻求不同的资产类别。

title: Super Micro’s stock is seeing its best run in a year thanks to Nvidia partnership
title_zh: 得益于与英伟达的合作，超微的股价创下一年来的最佳表现
text: Super Micro shares were leading the S&P 500’s gainers on Monday.
zh: 周一，超微股价领涨标准普尔 500 指数。

title: Micron’s stock momentum builds as the company inks a new Anthropic partnership
title_zh: 随着公司签署新的 Anthropic 合作伙伴关系，美光的股票势头增强
text: The companies announce a supply agreement for memory and storage.
zh: 两家公司宣布达成内存和存储供应协议。

title: Salesforce’s stock extends record losing streak. Can the company disrupt itself?
title_zh: Salesforce 的股价延续了创纪录的跌势。公司能否自我颠覆？
text: Shares of Salesforce posted their 14th consecutive day of losses as investors remain unconvinced of the company’s AI momentum.
zh: 由于投资者仍不相信该公司的人工智能发展势头，Salesforce 的股价连续 14 天下跌。
